Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman Pro vs Joe Sweet Caroline
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Capt Chris Adams, sight fish for Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon on the east coast of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Jeff Klozinski spend the day tracking down postspawn smallmouth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finding Transitional Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jeremy Smith and Dan Lindner roll up their sleeves for a seek and destroy mission to find big summer bluegills.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Finding Summer Blue Gills
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul, Perry, and Dan head east of Timmins to the historic waters of Frederick House Lake for a late-season ice adventure under warm, spring-like skies. What starts as a perfect day on the hardwater quickly turns into a multispecies showcase—pike, perch, walleye, and sauger all keep the crew busy as the bite fires up. But as Northern Ontario weather often reminds us, conditions shift fast. With the wind picking up and clouds rolling in, the team wraps up an incredible day and makes their way home, grateful for one more memorable outing before the thaw.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake

Image.alt: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake

Video.summary: Join us on an exhilarating journey deep into the heart of Northern Ontario as we tackle mid-summer walleye fishing like never before! Guided by the rising sun, we gear up with our Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake for a day filled with fishing action and good times. Joining the adventure is Mercury Canada Marketing Manager Cameron Racine, adding expertise and excitement to this unforgettable outing. Don't miss the fun, the fish, and the breathtaking scenery!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Northern Adventures: Mid-Summer Walleye Quest with Cameron Racine from Mercury Canada
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Groupers To Go
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Groupers to Go
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fly in with us to Blackbirch Lake with Gray Wood Outfitter for some non stop action
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Unsure of the path his life would take, Brad Peterson decided to join the U.S. Coast Guard. After saving many lives on the water as a part of rescue teams, Brad joined a new life-saving team as a nurse at the Minnesota VA. Today, we head out into the Gulf of Mexico to take Brad on his first saltwater fishing trip.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Coast Guard Veteran Brad Peterson
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James and Al Lindner head to the Alexandria area to catch smallmouth bass using some proven and new finesse tactics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finesse Tactics For Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Some of the best Sportfishing in the world takes place in Costa Rica. Especially out of a village named Nosara. The Nosara area is far from commercial fishing lanes and off tourists' beaten paths and is a best kept secret fishing and surfing destination. On this Stoked On Fishing adventure, we fish for Tuna, Billfish, and Dorado.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Costa Rica's Best Kept Fishing Secret, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman’s Pro Vs Joe Sophomore Jinx1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Walleye fishing early spring walleye in the Ivanhoe River.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Sierra Nevada mountain range in California is home to many lakes with excellent trout fishing. Thanks to Shea's father, Patt McIntee, June Lake has been a favorite for decades. We spend some time fishing both June Lake and Lake Crowley. Then later, we fish a lake that is brand new to us.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - We Love Fishing the High Sierras, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Florida Flippin'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: If you've never been to Alaska, it is an absolute must-see. Alaska is amazingly unique. If you have been there before, you know what we are talking about. This week, Shea McIntee and the crew settled in at Alaskan Anglers Inn, head out fishing, and hook onto their personal best halibut.
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska

Video.summary: It’s time to do some ice fishing with Tommy Hicks again! This week, we head to Ashland, WI, to catch multiple species on Chequamegon Bay! It’s always an adventure with Tommy and this week is no different!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Superior Multi-species

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Superior Multi-species
Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Superior Multi-species
Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Superior Multi-species

Video.summary: This week, we’re going to the Florida Keys to go Tarpon fishing! Chad and Jason from Forever Barnwood will join us, and this is sure to be a crazy, memorable trip!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Florida Tarpon Fishing

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Florida Tarpon Fishing
Larry Smith Outdoors | Florida Tarpon Fishing
Larry Smith Outdoors | Florida Tarpon Fishing
